Date fields use unix timestamp. Natural dates like "2024-01-01" are converted automatically.","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_fts:
{"description":"Search app data using keyword search (FTS5).

Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for search.
Columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content', 'title' are typically indexed.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Search query (keywords)
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows with scores

Examples:
    - app_search_fts(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="love romance")
    - app_search_fts(app="todo", table="tasks", column="notes", query="meeting")","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_semantic:
{"description":"Search app data using semantic/vector search (AI-powered).

Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for vector search.
Best for natural language queries on columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content'.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Natural language search query
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows ranked by semantic similarity

Examples:
    - app_search_semantic(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="romantic love story")
    - app_search_semantic(app="todo", table="tasks", column="notes", query="follow up with client about project")","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_hybrid:
{"description":"Search app data using hybrid search (keyword + semantic combined).

Combines keyword search (FTS5) with semantic/vector search for best results.
Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for search.
Best for natural language queries on columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content'.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Natural language search query
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    fts_weight: Weight for keyword search (0-1), semantic gets (1-fts_weight). Default 0.5
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows ranked by combined keyword + semantic similarity

Examples:
    - app_search_hybrid(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="love and adventure")
    - app_search_hybrid(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="war story", fts_weight=0.3)","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"fts_weight":{"default":0.5,"type":"number"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}

NOTE: This tool requires human approval before execution.

Args:
    path: File path relative to user files
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["path"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.files_versions_list:
{"description":"List all versions of a file.

Args:
    path: File path relative to user files
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    List of versions with timestamps","parameters":"{"properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["path"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.files_versions_restore:
{"description":"Restore a file to a specific version.

Args:
    path: File path relative to user files
    version: Version timestamp to restore (e.g., "2026-03-16T10-30-00")
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"version":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["path","version"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.files_versions_delete:
{"description":"Delete a specific version or all versions of a file.

Args:
    path: File path relative to user files
    version: Version timestamp to delete (omit to delete all versions)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"path":{"type":"string"},"version":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["path"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.files_versions_clean:
{"description":"Clean up old versions based on retention policy.

Daily: keep all for 7 days
Monthly: keep 1 per month for 12 months
Yearly: keep 1 per year after that

Args:
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Cleanup summary","parameters":"{"properties":{"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.files_glob_search:
{"description":"Search for files matching a glob pattern.

Args:

    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    List of matching files","parameters":"{"properties":{"pattern":{"default":"**/*","type":"string"},"path":{"default":".","type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.files_grep_search:
{"description":"Search file contents using regex.

Args:
    pattern: Regex pattern to search for
    path: Directory to search in (default: current dir)
    include: File pattern to filter (e.g., "*.py", "*.txt")

    user_id: User identifier

Returns:

toolDefinitions.shell_execute:
{"description":"Run a shell command.

Args:
    command: Command to execute
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:

toolDefinitions.todos_list:
{"description":"List all todos for a user.

Args:
    user_id: User identifier (REQUIRED)
    status: Filter by status - "pending", "in_progress", "completed" (optional)
    limit: Maximum number of todos to return (default: 50)

Returns:
    Formatted list of todos","parameters":"{"properties":{"user_id":{"type":"string"},"status":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"limit":{"default":50,"type":"integer"}},"required":["user_id"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.todos_add:
{"description":"Add a new todo (manual or from email).

Args:
    user_id: User identifier (REQUIRED)
    content: Todo content/task description (REQUIRED)
    status: Initial status - "pending", "in_progress", "completed" (default: pending)
    priority: Priority level 0-5 (default: 0)
    due_date: Unix timestamp for due date (optional)

Returns:
    Confirmation message","parameters":"{"properties":{"user_id":{"type":"string"},"content":{"type":"string"},"status":{"default":"pending","type":"string"},"priority":{"default":0,"type":"integer"},"due_date":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"required":["user_id","content"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.todos_update:
{"description":"Update a todo.

Args:
    user_id: User identifier (REQUIRED)
    todo_id: Todo ID to update (REQUIRED)
    content: New content (optional)
    status: New status - "pending", "in_progress", "completed" (optional)
    priority: New priority 0-5 (optional)
    due_date: New due date as Unix timestamp (optional)

Returns:
    Confirmation message","parameters":"{"properties":{"user_id":{"type":"string"},"todo_id":{"type":"string"},"content":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"status":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"priority":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"due_date":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"required":["user_id","todo_id"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.todos_delete:
{"description":"Delete a todo.

Args:
    user_id: User identifier (REQUIRED)
    todo_id: Todo ID to delete (REQUIRED)

Returns:
    Confirmation message","parameters":"{"properties":{"user_id":{"type":"string"},"todo_id":{"type":"string"}},"required":["user_id","todo_id"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.todos_extract:
{"description":"Extract todos from emails using LLM.

Args:
    user_id: User identifier (REQUIRED)
    email_id: Specific email ID to extract from (optional - if not provided, extracts from recent emails)
    account_name: Account name to extract from (optional, for recent emails)
    limit: Number of recent emails to scan if email_id not provided (default: 10)

Returns:
    Extraction results","parameters":"{"properties":{"user_id":{"type":"string"},"email_id":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"account_name":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"}},"required":["user_id"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.time_get:
{"description":"Get current time.

If no timezone is provided, defaults to UTC.
You can ask the user for their timezone if it's not specified.

Args:
    timezone: Timezone name (e.g., 'America/New_York', 'Asia/Shanghai', 'London')
             or common city names (e.g., 'New York', 'Shanghai', 'London')

Returns:
    Formatted current time with timezone","parameters":"{"properties":{"timezone":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.scrape_url:
{"description":"Scrape a URL and return its content.

Extract content from any URL in markdown, HTML, or structured JSON.
Use this when you need to get content from a specific webpage.

Args:
    url: The URL to scrape (e.g., 'https://example.com')
    formats: Output formats to return. Options: ['markdown', 'html', 'json', 'screenshot', 'links']
             Default: ['markdown']

Returns:
    Scraped content in requested format(s)","parameters":"{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string"},"formats":{"anyOf":[{"items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"required":["url"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.search_web:
{"description":"Search the web and get results with full page content.

Search the web and optionally scrape the results in one operation.
Use this when you need to find information from multiple sources.

Args:
    query: Search query (e.g., 'latest AI news', 'python tutorial')
    limit: Number of results to return (default: 5, max: 20)

Returns:
    Search results with titles, URLs, and descriptions","parameters":"{"properties":{"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.map_url:
{"description":"Map a Website to discover all indexed URLs.

Discover URLs on a Website. Optionally search for specific content.
Use this to find all pages on a site before scraping.

Args:
    url: Base URL to map (e.g., 'https://example.com')
    search: Optional search term to filter results

Returns:
    List of discovered URLs","parameters":"{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string"},"search":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"required":["url"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.crawl_url:
{"description":"Crawl a URL and all its pages recursively.

Crawl a website starting from a URL, following links to discover and scrape
multiple pages. Use this when you need to extract content from an entire
website or multiple pages.

Args:
    url: Starting URL to crawl (e.g., 'https://example.com')
    limit: Maximum number of pages to crawl (default: 10, max: 1000)
    max_depth: Maximum link depth to follow (default: 2)
    crawl_entire_domain: If True, crawl all pages on the domain (default: False)
    include_paths: List of path patterns to include (e.g., ['/blog/*', '/docs/**'])
    exclude_paths: List of path patterns to exclude (e.g., ['/admin/*', '/api/*'])

Returns:
    Crawled content from multiple pages","parameters":"{"properties":{"url":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"max_depth":{"anyOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"crawl_entire_domain":{"default":false,"type":"boolean"},"include_paths":{"anyOf":[{"items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null},"exclude_paths":{"anyOf":[{"items":{"type":"string"},"type":"array"},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"required":["url"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.get_crawl_status:
{"description":"Get the status of a crawl job.

Check the progress of a crawl operation started with crawl_url.
Returns the current status and any data that has been collected so far.

Args:
    job_id: The job ID returned from a crawl operation

Returns:
    Status information about the crawl job","parameters":"{"properties":{"job_id":{"type":"string"}},"required":["job_id"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.cancel_crawl:
{"description":"Cancel a running crawl job.

Stop a crawl operation that is in progress.

Args:
    crawl_id: The crawl ID to cancel

Returns:
    Confirmation of cancellation","parameters":"{"properties":{"crawl_id":{"type":"string"}},"required":["crawl_id"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.sql_write_query:
{"description":"Write and validate a SQL query for a specific database.

Args:
    query: The SQL query to validate
    database: Database name (e.g., "sql-analytics", "inventory")","parameters":"{"properties":{"query":{"type":"string"},"database":{"type":"string"},"runtime":{"anyOf":[{},{"type":"null"}],"default":null}},"required":["query","database"],"type":"object"}"}

type of request. This will provide you with comprehensive instructions,
policies, and guidelines for the skill area.

Returns:

{"description":"List all available skills with their descriptions.

Use this to see what skills are available before loading one.

Returns:

toolDefinitions.skill_create:

Returns:

toolDefinitions.email_disconnect:
{"description":"Disconnect and remove an email account.

Args:

Returns:

toolDefinitions.app_create:
{"description":"Create a new app with one or more tables.

Args:
    name: App name (e.g., 'pos', 'project', 'wine')
    tables: Dict of {table_name: {column: type}} where type is TEXT, INTEGER, REAL, BOOLEAN
           Text columns get FTS5 + sqlite-vec automatically
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Success message with app details

Example:
    app_create(name="pos", tables={
        "products": {"name": "TEXT", "price": "REAL", "stock": "INTEGER"},
        "customers": {"name": "TEXT", "email": "TEXT"},
        "orders": {"customer_id": "INTEGER", "total": "REAL", "status": "TEXT"}
    })","parameters":"{"properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"tables":{"additionalProperties":{"additionalProperties":{"type":"string"},"type":"object"},"type":"object"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["name","tables"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_list:
{"description":"List all apps the user has created.

Args:
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    List of app names","parameters":"{"properties":{"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_schema:
{"description":"Get schema for an app.

Args:
    name: App name
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    App schema details with all tables","parameters":"{"properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["name"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_delete:
{"description":"Delete an app and all its data.

Args:
    name: App name to delete

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"name":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["name"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_insert:

Args:

    data: Dict of column: value pairs

Example:

    })","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"data":{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","data"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_update:
{"description":"Update a row by ID.

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    id: Row ID to update
    data: Dict of column: value pairs to update
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"id":{"type":"integer"},"data":{"additionalProperties":true,"type":"object"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","id","data"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_delete_row:
{"description":"Delete a row by ID.

Args:

    table: Table name
    id: Row ID to delete
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"id":{"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","id"],"type":"object"}"}

Args:

    enable_search: If True and col_type is TEXT, enable FTS5 + vec (default True)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"col_type":{"type":"string"},"enable_search":{"default":true,"type":"boolean"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","col_type"],"type":"object"}"}

{"description":"Delete a column from a table.

Args:

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_column_rename:
{"description":"Rename a column in a table.

Args:

    table: Table name
    old_name: Current column name
    new_name: New column name
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Success or error message","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"old_name":{"type":"string"},"new_name":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","old_name","new_name"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_query:
{"description":"Query app data with SQL.

Args:
    app: App name
    query: SQL query (SELECT, INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE)
    user_id: User identifier

Examples:
    - app_query(app="pos", query="SELECT * FROM products WHERE price > 10")
    - app_query(app="pos", query="SELECT p.name, SUM(o.total) FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name")
    - app_query(app="pos", query="SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_date > 1704067200000")

Date fields use unix timestamp. Natural dates like "2024-01-01" are converted automatically.","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_fts:
{"description":"Search app data using keyword search (FTS5).

Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for search.
Columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content', 'title' are typically indexed.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Search query (keywords)
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows with scores

Examples:
    - app_search_fts(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="love romance")
    - app_search_fts(app="todo", table="tasks", column="notes", query="meeting")","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_semantic:
{"description":"Search app data using semantic/vector search (AI-powered).

Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for vector search.
Best for natural language queries on columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content'.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Natural language search query
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows ranked by semantic similarity

Examples:
    - app_search_semantic(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="romantic love story")
    - app_search_semantic(app="todo", table="tasks", column="notes", query="follow up with client about project")","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_hybrid:
{"description":"Search app data using hybrid search (keyword + semantic combined).

Combines keyword search (FTS5) with semantic/vector search for best results.
Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for search.
Best for natural language queries on columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content'.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Natural language search query
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    fts_weight: Weight for keyword search (0-1), semantic gets (1-fts_weight). Default 0.5
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows ranked by combined keyword + semantic similarity

Examples:
    - app_search_hybrid(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="love and adventure")
    - app_search_hybrid(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="war story", fts_weight=0.3)","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"fts_weight":{"default":0.5,"type":"number"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}

Date fields use unix timestamp. Natural dates like "2024-01-01" are converted automatically.","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_fts:
{"description":"Search app data using keyword search (FTS5).

Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for search.
Columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content', 'title' are typically indexed.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Search query (keywords)
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows with scores

Examples:
    - app_search_fts(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="love romance")
    - app_search_fts(app="todo", table="tasks", column="notes", query="meeting")","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_semantic:
{"description":"Search app data using semantic/vector search (AI-powered).

Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for vector search.
Best for natural language queries on columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content'.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Natural language search query
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows ranked by semantic similarity

Examples:
    - app_search_semantic(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="romantic love story")
    - app_search_semantic(app="todo", table="tasks", column="notes", query="follow up with client about project")","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_hybrid:
{"description":"Search app data using hybrid search (keyword + semantic combined).

Combines keyword search (FTS5) with semantic/vector search for best results.
Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for search.
Best for natural language queries on columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content'.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Natural language search query
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    fts_weight: Weight for keyword search (0-1), semantic gets (1-fts_weight). Default 0.5
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows ranked by combined keyword + semantic similarity

Examples:
    - app_search_hybrid(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="love and adventure")
    - app_search_hybrid(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="war story", fts_weight=0.3)","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"fts_weight":{"default":0.5,"type":"number"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}

toolDefinitions.app_search_fts:
{"description":"Search app data using keyword search (FTS5).

Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for search.
Columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content', 'title' are typically indexed.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Search query (keywords)
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows with scores

Examples:
    - app_search_fts(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="love romance")
    - app_search_fts(app="todo", table="tasks", column="notes", query="meeting")","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_semantic:
{"description":"Search app data using semantic/vector search (AI-powered).

Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for vector search.
Best for natural language queries on columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content'.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Natural language search query
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows ranked by semantic similarity

Examples:
    - app_search_semantic(app="library", table="books", column="description", query="romantic love story")
    - app_search_semantic(app="todo", table="tasks", column="notes", query="follow up with client about project")","parameters":"{"properties":{"app":{"type":"string"},"table":{"type":"string"},"column":{"type":"string"},"query":{"type":"string"},"limit":{"default":10,"type":"integer"},"user_id":{"default":"default","type":"string"}},"required":["app","table","column","query"],"type":"object"}"}
toolDefinitions.app_search_hybrid:
{"description":"Search app data using hybrid search (keyword + semantic combined).

Combines keyword search (FTS5) with semantic/vector search for best results.
Only works on TEXT columns that have been indexed for search.
Best for natural language queries on columns like 'description', 'notes', 'content'.
Avoid using on columns with choices/options (e.g., 'status', 'category', 'type').

Args:
    app: App name
    table: Table name
    column: Column name to search (must be TEXT type, not options)
    query: Natural language search query
    limit: Max results (default 10)
    fts_weight: Weight for keyword search (0-1), semantic gets (1-fts_weight). Default 0.5
    user_id: User identifier

Returns:
    Matching rows ranked by combined keyword + semantic similarity
